results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: A remote village in Serbia in 1941. Through the fate of rural residents and the destiny of a partisan detachment reflected is the horror and absurdity of war in Serbia during World War II. On one hand, ordinary people and partisans; the Germans and the Chetniks on the other.

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: In the long days of summer in a beach town on the New Jersey shore, high schooler Alan and his friends Red and Smitty break into vacation homes to steal valuables, funding dates at the boardwalk and lunches at the burger stand. When Alan and his younger brother Peter find a bag of gold coins, they try to hide them from the others — but Red, suspicious and violently unpredictable, seems willing to do anything to get the money.

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: A 12-year-old boy and his single mother live separate lives. The boy spends his days alone while his mother works and goes out with her friends. The boy’s solitude is both a source of freedom and a cause for grief. His explorations slowly bring to light the dark contrast between the rules of society and the laws of nature. And before long, the delicate balance of his inner world becomes shattered by unforeseen events.

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: On a secluded beach, Dylan and Malachi find a temporary escape from a world that refuses to understand them. But as the tide shifts, a raw confrontation about love, identity, and family rejection threatens to change everything between them forever.

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: Is this fishing excursion really about bonding between a father and his son?

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: A glacier. Icebergs. Cold fog gliding through the folds.

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: A queer supernatural break-up album about a woman who falls in love with an angel.

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: What the ocean bringeth, the ocean taketh away

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: The fact that Yoel Kanovich didn’t report for the army reserve training he was summoned to is by no means his only problem. His marriage to Sigal is on the rocks, his father recently died of a heart attack, and on top of that he’s lost his job as a history teacher. His nerves apparently got the better of him during a lesson on the Balfour Declaration, of all things.

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: Magdalena tells her dream to Tomás: in this one, she drowns in the deep blue sea while he greets her from the shore. On the verge of the birth of their first child, this couple makes a final trip. That dream, and the weekend spent on the beach, would mark the end of the relationship.

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: To lift the spirits of her friend Mélanie, Lou brings her on a camping trip to a lone fortress on the sea. As Lou hides her little romantic secrets, Mélanie lingers in her ruminations. One morning, a solitary and enigmatic figure appears and draws Melanie into a fantastical encounter.

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: The Toronto islands are subject to flooding and erosion. The ebbs and flows of Lake Ontario / Lake Iroquois have created the islands and will one day take them away. The shoreline is natural and artificial, built up with concrete sidewalk ruins but always just an ever-shifting sandbar. Footage was captured in 16mm Kodak Ektachrome during a 5-week residency at Artscape Gibraltar Point in 2013.

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: The arrival of a stranger -a thief running away from his accomplices- alters the routine of a big and solitary house in the Parana river delta inhabited by two women. That man carries a somber past behind him and moves towards an equally loo-my destiny. A film noir in a jungly landscape, with a dark and dense atmosphere.

results.title: At Low Tide
results.overview: Arms outstretched, a masked god stands on a clifftop surveying the rocks below and sees a sailor lying drowned in a rockpool, while a mermaid makes tiny silver boats. The god approaches and embraces the mermaid. Filmed on the Dorset coast.

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: Luisa falls in love for the first with her neighbor Anna while she spends her summer vacation at the beach with her family. At the same time, Luisa will find out something about her parent's relationship that will make her question her ideals of love and inevitably grow up.

results.title: Around Low Tide
results.overview: A five-minute silent black-and-white film, made on and under a pier around low tide.

results.title: Low Tide
results.overview: Stephanie, a single mother of four pre-teens, struggles to maintain happiness in her family after experiencing traumatic events in the past.

results.title: High Tide or Low Tide?
results.overview: In an Island-Barangay in Mauban, Quezon, an 18-year-old closeted gay, high schooler steers through the weight of his hypomanic highs and depressive lows all while navigating the discoveries and complexities of his sexuality, first love, heartbreak, and the narrow confines of his small community. Unknowingly, he tells his story through a performance for the school's dance in a poem contest.

results.title: Low Tide: DLC
results.overview: A companion piece to 'Low Tide: A Newly Restored Work by Thomas Wright', Low Tide DLC tells the story of another of Thomas Wright's lost films: 'Lowlands: Summer '88,'  an impressionistic formal study comprised and sound and landscapes and textures made during travels through the United States in the spring of 1989.

results.title: Karrabing! Low Tide Turning
results.overview: In the Northern Territory of Australia, an extended Aboriginal family attempts to track down a missing family member so as not to lose their government housing.
